name: Liquid-Neon Cyber-Metropolis
author: Jules
description: An infinite, gravity-defying cyberpunk cityscape constructed from rivers of hyper-luminescent liquid neon and dark matter concrete, where architectural monoliths dynamically extrude, twist, and warp their geometry to the rhythm of heavy audio frequencies.

params.name: Intensity
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Speed
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Scale
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Mouse Influence
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
